name: documentation_32_tasks
description: 32 documentation generation tasks across 4 categories. Docstring and README tasks share structural templates; changelog entries are unique.
tasks: Write a Google-style docstring for a Python function that validates email addresses using regex.
Generate a docstring for a Python function that parses CSV files and returns a list of dictionaries.
Write a NumPy-style docstring for a function that calculates the moving average of a time series.
Generate a docstring for a Python method that authenticates users against an LDAP directory.
Write a docstring for a function that resizes images to specified dimensions while preserving aspect ratio.
Generate a Google-style docstring for a method that batches database inserts for bulk loading.
Write a docstring for a function that encrypts sensitive data using AES-256-GCM.
Generate a docstring for a Python function that retries failed HTTP requests with exponential backoff.
Write a README section describing the installation process for a Python package that requires system dependencies.
Generate a README getting-started guide for a REST API with authentication and rate limiting.
Write a README troubleshooting section for common Docker deployment issues with this application.
Generate a README section explaining the configuration options for a distributed task queue.
Write a README section describing the testing strategy: unit tests, integration tests, and end-to-end tests.
Generate a README contributing guide with branch naming, commit message, and PR review conventions.
Write a README architecture overview section for a microservices application with 5 services.
Generate a README deployment section covering local development, staging, and production environments.
Write API documentation for a user registration endpoint including request/response schemas and error codes.
Generate API docs for a paginated search endpoint with filtering, sorting, and cursor-based pagination.
Write API documentation for a file upload endpoint supporting multipart uploads up to 100MB.
Generate API docs for a webhook registration endpoint with signature verification and retry semantics.
Write API documentation for a batch processing endpoint that accepts arrays of up to 1000 items.
Generate API docs for an SSE (Server-Sent Events) streaming endpoint for real-time notifications.
Write API documentation for an OAuth2 token endpoint supporting authorization code and client credentials flows.
Generate API docs for a GraphQL endpoint including schema introspection, queries, and mutations.
Write a changelog entry for version 2.3.0 that adds WebSocket support and deprecates the polling API.
Generate a changelog entry for a security patch that fixes CVE-2024-1234 in the authentication module.
Write a changelog entry for a breaking change that migrates from REST to gRPC for internal service communication.
Generate a changelog entry for a performance release that reduces P99 latency by 40% through connection pooling.
Write a changelog entry for a feature release adding multi-region support with active-active replication.
Generate a changelog entry for a maintenance release updating 15 dependencies and fixing 3 minor bugs.
Write a changelog entry for a release that adds RBAC (role-based access control) with 5 predefined roles.
Generate a changelog entry for a release that introduces a plugin system with 3 built-in plugins.
